Two critical bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) CombatPage.js now navigates to /gm-screen/{campaignId} instead of /dm-screen (which caused black screen on combat end), 2) DiceRoller.js now allows 1-999 dice instead of limited preset buttons. Test credentials: email=stress_test_1772651200@test.com, password=TestPass123!, campaign=dm-battle-maps, scenario=dm-battle-maps. helpers.ts has been updated with correct campaign IDs and test user credentials.
